zh.Compton Verney, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾康普頓 維尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Verney於1403年出生在英國瓦維其可爾康普頓 維尼時，他的父親John de Verney34歲，母親Alice de Langley24歲。他於1433年與Eleanor Loutham在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾康普頓 維尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1488年2月5日在他的家鄉享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Verney于1403年出生在英国瓦維其可爾康普頓 維尼时，他的父亲John de Verney34岁，母亲Alice de Langley24岁。他于1433年与Eleanor Loutham在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾康普頓 維尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1488年2月5日在他的家乡享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Verney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Varney
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from a French place called Vernay, probably chiefly Saint-Paul-de-Vernay (Calvados). The placename comes from a derivative of Gaulish verno- ‘alder’ + the locative suffix -acum.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Verney was born in 1403, in Compton Verney, Warwickshire, England, his father, John de Verney, was 34 and his mother, Alice de Langley, was 24. He married Eleanor Loutham in 1433, in Compton Verney, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 5 February 1488, in his hometown, at the age of 85.

Il a épousé Eleanor Loutham en 1433, à Compton Verney, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 5 février 1488, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Verney(이)가 1403년 영국 워윅실르 콤프턴 베른이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Verney(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Langley(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1433년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 콤프턴 베른이에서 Eleanor Loutham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1488년 2월 5일 그의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Verney родился в 1403 г. в местности комптон вирни, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Verney было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Langley, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Loutham в 1433 г. в местности комптон вирни, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 5 февраля 1488 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 85 лет.
